overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city center during golden hour. The player crosses two major intersections, passing pedestrians and futuristic vehicles amidst towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements and wet reflective streets.

starting to walk across the yellow-striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the broad yellow-striped crosswalk toward the building with large digital billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white pants and dark jacket walking toward the camera
pedestrian with distinctive purple hair walking toward the camera

entered.detail: commercial building with yellow neon accent lighting and two large digital billboards displaying advertisements
broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow and black stripes
tall modern pole with traffic signals and street lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a wide urban intersection during golden hour, facing a commercial building with prominent digital billboards. The camera walks forward across the yellow-striped crosswalk, passing pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. The wet asphalt reflects the neon lights and warm sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with neon underlighting

events.description: entering covered walkway under building overhang with yellow neon trim
turning right at the street corner

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk with neon-lit storefronts, then turning the corner

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow plaid shirt walking along the building facade

entered.detail: walkway under building overhang with reflective wet pavement and yellow neon accent lighting
corner building with prominent red neon signage reading BD SHACK

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the camera enters a covered walkway with yellow neon underlighting and reflective wet tiles. The BD SHACK building becomes visible on the right as the camera turns the corner, moving from the sheltered arcade onto the open sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with commercial facades and vehicle traffic

events.description: exiting covered area onto open street with view of futuristic skyscrapers
white futuristic sedan driving past on the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the street sidewalk with BD SHACK building on the right, observing passing vehicles and cityscape

notable_agents.action: white futuristic sedan driving along the street past the camera

entered.detail: large red overhead structure spanning the street with traffic signals and signage
tall digital display tower showing animated holographic advertisements
tall glass and steel towers with reflective surfaces and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the open city street with the BD SHACK building prominent on the right. A red traffic gantry spans the road ahead, and futuristic skyscrapers rise in the distance. A white futuristic car drives past on the street as the camera approaches the next intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection crosswalk with heavy pedestrian traffic

events.description: entering second major crosswalk at intersection
dense crowd of pedestrians crossing the street toward the camera

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection through a dense crowd of pedestrians moving in various directions

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians in business and casual attire crossing toward the camera
pedestrian in dark jacket walking briskly across the crosswalk

entered.detail: second pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes at the busy intersection
large red planter containing a small palm tree on the sidewalk corner

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a second wide crosswalk filled with a dense crowd of pedestrians crossing in various directions. The BD SHACK building and traffic gantry fall behind as the camera moves through the intersection. A large red planter with a palm tree appears on the left as the camera approaches the opposite curb, with holographic advertisements still visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit urban center, moving from a wide sun-drenched intersection into a sheltered arcade and back out into a crowded city thoroughfare. It begins by crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk under the glow of golden hour, where wet asphalt reflects the surrounding digital billboards and passing pedestrians. As the camera reaches the other side, the scene shifts into a covered walkway with yellow neon underlighting before turning a corner past the BD SHACK building onto an open sidewalk. The camera then advances along the street, passing a white futuristic car and a red traffic gantry while towering skyscrapers loom in the distance. Finally, the movement leads into a second wide intersection filled with a dense crowd of people, passing a red planter with a palm tree as holographic advertisements flicker on the right.
